tasks.cluster_description: Know number names and the count sequence.
tasks.title: Generate Dataset for K.CC.A
tasks.description:
Implement/extend generators and views to cover: K.CC.A.1. Details:
- K.CC.A.1: Counting generators cap at Scope.NumbersSmaller20 and there is no generator/view for the rote count sequence to 100 or for skip counting by tens (Scope.DerivedCount).

tasks.cluster_description: Count to tell the number of objects.
tasks.title: Generate Dataset for K.CC.B
tasks.description:
Implement/extend generators and views to cover: K.CC.B.5. Details:
- K.CC.B.5: The rectangular array arrangement (Scope.BoxArrangement) is not supported by the counting views (only linear/circular/scattered arrangements).

tasks.cluster_description: Understand addition as putting together and adding to, and understand subtraction as taking apart and taking from.
tasks.title: Extend Ontology for K.OA.A
tasks.description:
Extend ontology to support: K.OA.A.5. Details:
- K.OA.A.5: Scope.NumbersSmaller5 (The ontology has no Scope.NumbersSmaller5, so the "within 5" restriction cannot be expressed.)

tasks.cluster_description: Understand addition as putting together and adding to, and understand subtraction as taking apart and taking from.
tasks.title: Generate Dataset for K.OA.A
tasks.description:
Implement/extend generators and views to cover: K.OA.A.1. Details:
- K.OA.A.1: The operations-representation view exists only as a checklist stub (no spec.ts/view.tsx), so there is no view rendering object/drawing representations of addition and subtraction.

tasks.cluster_description: Identify and describe shapes (squares, circles, triangles, rectangles, hexagons, cubes, cones, cylinders, and spheres).
tasks.title: Generate Dataset for K.G.A
tasks.description:
Implement/extend generators and views to cover: K.G.A.1. Details:
- K.G.A.1: The shape-env-shapes generator only supports circle, square and rectangle; further environment shapes (e.g. Area.Triangle, Area.Hexagon) are not supported yet.

tasks.cluster_description: Analyze, compare, create, and compose shapes.
tasks.title: Generate Dataset for K.G.B
tasks.description:

Implement/extend generators and views to cover: 1.OA.A.1, 1.OA.A.2. Details:
- 1.OA.A.1: Unknowns in all positions are not expressible; the arithmetic generator and word-problem view only produce result-unknown problems.

- 1.OA.B.3: No generator/view exercises arithmetic laws (Area.CommutativeLaw / Area.AssociativeLaw).
